comment.description: user comment associated to an object in the dictionary

warehouse.description: The warehouse the alert runs in

condition.description: The SQL statement that must be evaluated to determine whether to trigger the alert

action.description: The SQL statement to execute when the alert is triggered

created_on.description: Date and time when the alert was created.

database_name.description: Database in which the alert is stored

schema_name.description: Schema in which the alert is stored

owner_role_type.description: The type of role that owns the alert

state.description: The current state of the alert
